entry.summary:
Author: Bullshark_Kid

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,594Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

entry.title: Free Kittens
entry.summary:
Author: Bullshark_Kid

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,506Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 27

Summary: Selina’s jaw dropped. She was good at hiding her emotions, rarely surprised, even more rarely shaken, but… she hadn’t been expecting this. Two wide eyes stared at her, unblinking. One icy blue. The other a striking green, the same shade as her own.   Or:What if Tim wasn’t Jack Drake's kid, but an oopsy science experiment gone (kinda right) wrong? What if he were Janet Drake and Selina Kyle's kid?

entry.title: sleep
entry.summary:
Author: brustephs

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 662Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 54

Summary: It wasn’t like Dick had planned this. Not originally, at least. Tim had started sleeping in his bed. And it had been innocent. Tim liked to just lurk and hide in people's apartments and stuff. It wasn't like he was looking for Dick to fuck him. He thought of Dick as his brother. But Dick just couldn't stop himself. entry.title: You're A God
entry.summary:
Author: Toscaredtospeak

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,923Chapters: 3/7Kudos: 10

Summary: Heroism and love mixed too well at times. Tim knew Kon because they were heroes. He loved Kon because of the hero he was. Tim’s heroism was shaped by Kon, molded by Kon’s subtle touches over the years, his body and blood dyed until he bled Kon’s colors. There was a constant he knew every time he woke up with Kon in his arms while the morning sun came in under his curtains. Tim loved KonA series of vignettes of before and after Tim says I love you. And of course, they fuck in the meantime.

entry.summary:
Author: JuneJulySeptember

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,688Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 49

Summary: He really should have expected something like this. How many days — weeks? — has it been since he got here? Really, it's impressive Ra's has managed to keep his hands to himself this long.Tim doesn't so much hear him coming as sense a disturbance in the force. 'Something is off', his overwrought nervous system tells him just before Ra's large, warm hand grips the back of his neck.

entry.title: I see your sunshine
entry.summary:
Author: white_zane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,032Chapters: 9/12Kudos: 48

Summary: Did you ever think about detransitioning simply because you knew that it would kill you faster than any bullet ever could?He never actually said any of that out loud. He didn’t write it down either, afraid to make all of it real, afraid that he wouldn’t be heard anyway even if he put all of it out of there. Because usually he was fine, you know?Tim had never been a girl, but he couldn’t quite be a man either, no matter how hard he tried, he couldn’t fit into anything.A girl to most, a boy only to those that bothered to listen to him for more than five seconds. Or: Tim has been out as a Transman for some years now, but he feels like he never really got anywhere in his transition. Meanwhile, Damian starts thinking about who he is if he's more than a trained weapon designed to kill people.

entry.title: Baby Fever
entry.summary:
Author: batsandbees

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,317Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 97

Summary: "Do you think you can just take the tip?" Dick asked, leaning back a bit to watch Tim bite his lip, brows furrowing as he debated with himself. "I think— yeah," Tim said, hesitant "Just— Just the tip, okay?" He looked up at Dick with wide, teary eyes. Trusting. Dick groaned, "Yeah," He said, a little breathlessly "Just the tip." This time.

entry.title: Bruise of honor
entry.summary:
Author: Robin_The_Robiner

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,201Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: "My mother did not mean to hate me, she did not even know she hated me, and yet I was hated. And I carried that hate with me through life with more pride than it perhaps deserved. A bruise of honor." Tim reminisces about his dad, and how he will now never know whether that's the term Jack would've preferred.

entry.title: Lay Me Bare
entry.summary:
Author: HotMolasses

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,131Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 123

Summary: “You’re…you’re the first person I’ve been with, since my surgery,” Tim said. “I’m. I’m nervous. But. I trust you.”               He reached down to the bottom of his shirt and pulled it up. For a second he was blinded by fabric, and then he yanked it over his head and let it fall to the ground. He sat there, straddling Danny’s hips, and waited for Danny’s reaction.               His eyes raked down Tim’s chest like he was taking in a fine work of art. He licked his lips as his gaze fell lower, then lower, his eyelids falling halfway shut with desire. His eyes traced right, then left, then back up again to rest on Tim’s face. Tim tried to ignore that his scars were still pink. Reminded himself Danny said he wouldn’t care, so he wouldn’t.               “Gorgeous,” Danny said.

entry.title: i can't love you(how you want me to)
entry.summary:
Author: wensbat

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,632Chapters: 5/8Kudos: 19

Summary: Going undercover once again as Caroline Hill, she found she couldn’t help but feel a little more comfortable in her own skin when she was dressed and referred to in the way that matched “her disguise”. She still had a long way to go before she’d fully feel like she could be herself openly in this way, but getting a taste of “living as Caroline” made it harder and harder to deny these feelings. Heading back to her safehouse after getting information at the place she works she's stopped by a mugger little do that and Carol know Superboy shows up to put a stop to this. Refusing to leave until he knows that she'll get home safe starts a wonderful night that neither of them want to end.
